Empty Slot.NAME: Empty Slot
Empty Slot.DESCRIPTION: Empty Slot that can be filled with an Item

Bag of Tiles.NAME: Bag of Tiles
DESCRIPTION: [b]Tiles[/b] to add to your [b]Board[/b], the [b]Unselected Tiles[/b] will be added to your [b]Deck[/b].[br][font_size=10][color=

Architect's Hammer.NAME: Architect's Hammer
DESCRIPTION: [b]Permanently[/b] gain an additional [b]Tile[/b], [b]Joker[/b] or [b]Item[/b] [b]Selection[/b] in the [color=gold][b]Shop[/b][/color] or an [b]Item Slot[/b] in your [color=light_steel_blue][b]Inventory[/b][/color].[br][font_size=10][color=gray]You can only have up to

Touch of Midas.NAME: Touch of Midas
Touch of Midas.DESCRIPTION: [b]Rarify[/b] a [b]non-Gold Board Tile[/b] up to [color=gold][b]Gold[/b][/color], [b]Remove[/b] all [b]Effects[/b] from it.[br][font_size=10][color=Gray](If the [b]Chosen Tile[/b] has [b]Rainbow Effect[/b], it gains a random [i]color[/i])[/color][/font_size]

Beaver Teeth.NAME: Beaver Teeth
Beaver Teeth.DESCRIPTION: When consuming your [color=aquamarine][b]Bait[/b][/color] to [i][b]Draw[/b] from the [color=blue][b]River[/b][/color][/i], you can now [i]Choose[/i] the [b]Discarded Tile[/b] from which to begin [b]Drawing[/b].

Monkey's Paw.NAME: Monkey's Paw
Monkey's Paw.DESCRIPTION: Select a [b]Tile[/b] to [b]de-Rarify[/b], then [b]Choose one of three Tiles[/b], with [i]the same [b]Rarity[/b] and [b]Effects[/b][/i] as the [b]Selected Tile[/b], to [b]Replace the Selected Tile[/b].[br][font_size=10][color=gray]Can only be [b]Used[/b] 3 times per [b]Round[/b][/color][/font_size]

Bottled Nostalgia.NAME: Bottled Nostalgia
DESCRIPTION: [/b][/color] the [b]Tiles[/b] you would [b]Discard[/b] are [i]instead [b]Added[/b] back into your [b]Deck[/b][/i].[br][font_size=10][color=gray]Won't count as [b]Discarded Tiles[/b][/color][/font_size]
MISCELLANEOUS: [color=blue_violet][b]Press[/b] to [i]move[/i] the [b]Selected Tiles[/b] back into your [b]Deck[/b] and [/color][color=indigo]End your Round[/color].
